positive: A delicate, hyper-detailed illustration of various exotic tropical flowers and leaves (Monstera, orchid, hibiscus) rendered in a soft watercolor style with fine black ink outlines. Minimalist, botanical arrangement, earth tones, clean white background. Style of Alphonse Mucha meets modern botanical art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
